scripts.postinstall: node scripts/make-dict.js && node scripts/build-ja-dict.js && node -e "const {gzipSync}=require('zlib'),fs=require('fs');['extension/vendor/cedict.json','extension/vendor/ja-dict.json'].forEach(f=>{fs.writeFileSync(f+'.gz',gzipSync(fs.readFileSync(f)));fs.unlinkSync(f);});" && node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('extension/dict', { recursive: true }); require('fs').readdirSync('node_modules/kuromoji/dict').forEach(f => require('fs').copyFileSync('node_modules/kuromoji/dict/' + f, 'extension/dict/' + f))"
scripts.build: npm run build:popup && npm run build:content
